title: PWTotem
description: This resource pack replaces regular totems with custom player totems inspired by streamer PWGood. Now you’ll have unique totems of undying that reflect the streamer’s style!
body:
This resource pack replaces regular totems with custom player totems inspired by streamer PWGood. Now you’ll have unique totems of undying that reflect the streamer’s style!

Designed for versions from 1.18 to 1.21.1.

Replaces the texture and sound of the totem.
Carry PWGood’s essence with you everywhere in the game!

Download it in the name of the great flood.
